examples: The gill flaps opened like two gash wounds on the sides of its head as it thrashed helplessly in the gutter.
I zipped the tent flaps shut.
Uttering a cry, the sea gull flaps its wings.
There are flaps in the plastic where quarantine workers insert insecticide bombs to fumigate the gear.
He runs and flaps his arms at the flames, breathes in smoke and heat.
